name: Large Language Models / Transformers
description: Decoder-only and encoder-decoder transformers, pretraining and fine-tuning techniques, agentic systems, and reading the foundational papers behind modern LLMs.

projects.name: LLM evaluation harness
projects.blurb: Lightweight benchmark runner for comparing local checkpoints on reasoning tasks.

projects.name: Paper digest bot
projects.blurb: Weekly summary of arXiv cs.CL highlights, posted to Discord.

name: Vision Language Models
description: Multimodal encoders, contrastive learning, VQA, and grounding language in images and video.

projects.name: Lab-VQA demo
projects.blurb: Ask questions about images from the mechatronics lab in natural language.

name: Space Mouse
description: 6-DoF input device design — magnetic sensing, mechanical compliance, and host-side driver work.

projects.name: Prototype v2
projects.blurb: Hall-effect sensor array with USB-HID firmware.

name: RC Car / Go-Kart
description: 1/10-scale autonomous platform (F1Tenth) for fast perception-and-controls iteration, plus a full-size drive-by-wire kart for autonomous-driving experiments at higher speeds.

projects.name: F1Tenth lap timing
projects.blurb: Closed-loop time-trial runs in the lab hallway.

projects.name: Steering actuator
projects.blurb: Designing the steer-by-wire assembly and CAN bus electronics for the kart.

name: Drone
description: Quadrotor build-up, PX4/ArduPilot tuning, and indoor navigation experiments.

projects.name: Indoor waypoint flight
projects.blurb: Vicon-aided autonomous flight in the netted enclosure.

name: Self-balancing Hoverboard
description: Two-wheel inverted-pendulum platform — IMU sensor fusion, motor drivers, and balance controllers.

projects.name: LQR stand-up
projects.blurb: Tuning state-feedback controller for stable upright balance.

name: Robotic Arm 6DoF / CNC
description: Six-degree-of-freedom manipulator — kinematics, motion planning, and gripper design — alongside CNC machining for tool-path generation and precision part fabrication.

projects.name: Pick and place demo
projects.blurb: ROS 2 + MoveIt pipeline for sorting small objects on a table.

projects.name: Aluminum mounting plates
projects.blurb: CNC-machined standard mounts for the Robotic Arm and Drone subgroups.

name: Antenna Arrays for Obstacle Detection + Localization
description: RF beamforming and array signal processing for short-range obstacle sensing, combined with indoor positioning using UWB anchor grids — sensor fusion, calibration, and live tracking.

projects.name: MUSIC angle-of-arrival
projects.blurb: Lab-bench DoA estimation with a 4-element ULA.

projects.name: UWB anchor grid
projects.blurb: Eight-anchor ultra-wideband setup in the lab for centimeter-accuracy tracking.
